title: Book Discussion: The Ocean at the End of the Lane
bookTitle: The Ocean at the End of the Lane
author: Neil Gaiman
description: Our monthly community book club will gather to discuss "The Ocean at the End of the Lane" by Neil Gaiman. Share your thoughts, analyze the plot, and connect with fellow readers in a cozy, relaxed setting at City Lights Booksellers. Refreshments served.

title: Literary & Poetry Salon
bookTitle: All the Light We Cannot See
author: Anthony Doerr
description: An evening of lyrical prose and poetry inspired by the themes of "All the Light We Cannot See" and contemporary literature. Local poets and guest reader Anthony Doerr will share their works. Open mic to follow. Hosted by Boulder Book Store.

title: Creative Writing Workshop with Yuval Noah Harari
bookTitle: Sapiens: A Brief History of Humankind
author: Yuval Noah Harari
description: Unlock your writing potential in this interactive workshop led by acclaimed author Yuval Noah Harari. Inspired by the techniques used in "Sapiens: A Brief History of Humankind", we will explore character development, world-building, and pacing. Limited seats available, reservation recommended.
venue: John K. King Used & Rare Books

description: Join us at Barnes & Noble for an exclusive book signing event with the bestselling author Danielle L. Jensen, celebrating their work, including "The Bridge Kingdom". Copies of the book will be available for purchase, and the author will sign personal copies. Q&A session to precede signing.

title: Creative Writing Workshop with Yuval Noah Harari
bookTitle: Sapiens: A Brief History of Humankind
author: Yuval Noah Harari
description: Unlock your writing potential in this interactive workshop led by acclaimed author Yuval Noah Harari. Inspired by the techniques used in "Sapiens: A Brief History of Humankind", we will explore character development, world-building, and pacing. Limited seats available, reservation recommended.

title: Book Discussion: Onyx Storm
author: Rebecca Yarros
description: Our monthly community book club will gather to discuss "Onyx Storm" by Rebecca Yarros. Share your thoughts, analyze the plot, and connect with fellow readers in a cozy, relaxed setting at Books & Books. Refreshments served.

title: Author Signing: Emily Henry
author: Emily Henry
description: Join us at Books & Books for an exclusive book signing event with the bestselling author Emily Henry, celebrating their work, including "Funny Story". Copies of the book will be available for purchase, and the author will sign personal copies. Q&A session to precede signing.

title: Author Signing: Anthony Doerr
bookTitle: All the Light We Cannot See
author: Anthony Doerr
description: Join us at San Diego Comic-Con for an exclusive book signing event with the bestselling author Anthony Doerr, celebrating their work, including "All the Light We Cannot See". Copies of the book will be available for purchase, and the author will sign personal copies. Q&A session to precede signing.

title: Book Launch: Air Awakens
author: Elise Kova
description: Celebrate the official launch of "Air Awakens" by Elise Kova at Books-A-Million! Hear the author read select passages, enjoy refreshments, and engage in a lively discussion about the book's themes. Signed copies available.
